name: Sarah
history: Sarah is in a long-term relationship with Amelia, who has a demanding professional schedule. Sarah feels isolated during the week and does most household tasks without discussing her resentment with Amelia. She has a history of childhood separations from parents associated with distress.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: If I express my needs, I will be rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am alone because I am not important.
coping_strategies: Avoids discussing feelings and needs with Amelia to prevent conflict.
situation: Not receiving communication from the partner during the day and attempting to make contact.
behavior: Attempts to contact Amelia repeatedly, feels more isolated when there is no response.
